tone: John writes in a direct, concise, and professional-but-casual style. Emails are typically short — often just a sentence or two — and action-oriented, skipping pleasantries in favor of clear next steps. He occasionally uses informal shorthand and is comfortable being blunt about constraints (e.g., 'DSCR is tight', 'we do not have a 2nd chance').
sampleSignOff: Top 100 Purchase Mortgage Loan Origination - Nationwide / Top 1% Mortgage Volume - Nationwide / John George / Residential Sales Manager / NMLS: 343253
ignorePatterns: body:TITLE ORDER AGENT — DRY RUN PREVIEW
observations: John manages a high-volume mortgage brokerage pipeline spanning purchase loans, refinances, DSCR/investment properties, and foreign national borrowers across multiple lenders (UWM, Emporium TPO, ResiCentral, NewRez). He acts as a hands-on quarterback — coordinating between borrowers, title companies, appraisers, insurance agents, and underwriters simultaneously, often managing a dozen active files at once. His email patterns reveal a strong focus on clearing underwriting conditions quickly, managing appraisal strategy carefully (e.g., coaching reconsideration of value submissions), and keeping deals alive under tight DSCR and rate-lock constraints.
